Operation 'createSubscription' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks clarity on what is returned and the side effect of adding the subscriber to the distribution list. Added return value specification and side effect information for better AI agent understanding of the operation's full impact.

data.current_description: Create a subscription record for a subscriber. A mobile number, email or landline is required.
data.description_suggestion: Create a new subscription record for a subscriber in the account. Requires at least one contact method: mobile number, email, or landline. Returns the created SubscriptionResponse object containing the subscription ID and details. The subscriber is added to the account's distribution list upon successful creation.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity on what is returned and the side effect of adding the subscriber to the distribution list. Added return value specification and side effect information for better AI agent understanding of the operation's full impact.

message: Operation 'listSubscriptions' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Description is too generic and doesn't specify the return format or what subscription information is included. Enhanced with details about return structure and clarification that both active and inactive subscriptions are returned.

data.current_description: Retrieve all subscriptions for the account.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve all subscriptions for the authenticated account. Returns a list of SubscriptionResponse objects containing subscription details including IDs, contact information, and subscription status. Results include all active and inactive subscriptions.
data.reasoning: Description is too generic and doesn't specify the return format or what subscription information is included. Enhanced with details about return structure and clarification that both active and inactive subscriptions are returned.
